pageTitles.administrationDescription: Manage clients, accounts, audit records, and service status.
pageTitles.settingsDescription: Manage profile, MFA, passkeys, and active sessions.

auth.authenticatingDescription: Completing secure sign-in with GOSSO. Please wait.
auth.invalidCallbackParams: Invalid callback parameters. Missing code or state.

login.title: GOSSO
login.subtitle: Identity & Access Provider Console
login.mfaRequired: Multi-factor authentication required. Enter the code from your authenticator app.
login.enterBothFields: Please enter both username and password.
login.loginFailed: Login failed. Please check your credentials.
login.networkError: Network error occurred. Please try again.
login.passkeyLoginFailed: Passkey login failed. Please try again.
login.devCredentialsSuffix: Only enable this hint with VITE_SHOW_DEV_CREDENTIALS=true in local development.

passwordReset.forgotDescription: Enter the email address on your account. If it is configured, we will send a password reset link.
passwordReset.emailHint: Password reset is available only for accounts with an email address.
passwordReset.requestSuccess: If that email is configured for an active account, a reset link has been sent.
passwordReset.requestFailed: Unable to request a reset link. Please try again.
passwordReset.resetDescription: Use the reset link from your email to set a new password.
passwordReset.resetSuccess: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in with the new password.
passwordReset.resetFailed: The reset link is invalid or has expired.
passwordReset.invalidLink: This password reset link is invalid or missing a token.
passwordReset.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 12 characters long.

home.title: GOSSO Admin Console
home.description: Welcome to the self-hosted OpenID Connect / OAuth 2.0 identity provider administration interface. Manage security credentials, clients, user scopes, and active sessions.
home.accessDenied: Access Denied: Account lacks administrator permissions.
home.clientRegistryDescription: Register and configure OAuth2 Client credentials, authorized redirect URIs, scopes, and flow models.
home.userControlDescription: Audit active accounts, update account status, and assign roles for permission scopes.
home.mfaAndPasskeysDescription: View system audit logs, configure security, and manage global OIDC provider discovery profiles.

admin.accessDeniedDescription: Your account is signed in, but it does not have administrator permissions to access this console.

clients.title: OAuth2 Clients
clients.description: Register applications, redirect URIs, grant types, and scopes for OIDC integrations.
clients.noClientsDescription: Begin by registering your first application client to integrate OIDC authentication.
clients.descriptionPlaceholder: Short description of the client app
clients.redirectUrisHint: Absolute URLs allowed to receive auth codes. Multiple URLs separated by commas.
clients.adminScopeWarning: Admin scope allows this client to request tokens for GOSSO management APIs. Only enable it for trusted first-party admin clients.
clients.nameRedirectRequired: Name and Redirect URIs are required.
clients.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this OAuth2 client? This action is permanent.
clients.secretWarning: Please copy the client secret credential. It will NOT be displayed again for security reasons.

users.title: User Accounts
users.description: Create accounts, manage status, assign roles, and inspect authorized applications.
users.noUsersDescription: Create the first managed user account, then assign roles if needed.
users.createModalDescription: Create a standard active account. Assign administrator access separately through Roles.
users.contactHint: Provide at least one contact method. Email and phone must be unique.
users.createUserValidation: Username, display name, and password are required.
users.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 12 characters long.
users.cannotToggleOwnAccount: You cannot enable/disable your own admin account.
users.enableConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to enable user "{{username}}"?
users.disableConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to disable user "{{username}}"?
users.deleteUserConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this user account?
users.cannotDeleteOwnAccount: You cannot delete your own admin account.
users.changePasswordDescription: Set a new password for user {{name}}.
users.passwordUpdatedSuccess: Password updated successfully. All user sessions have been revoked.
users.cannotResetOwnMfa: You cannot reset MFA on your own admin account. Please use Security Settings page instead.
users.resetMfaConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to reset MFA for user "{{username}}"? This will disable TOTP, Backup Codes, and WebAuthn Passkeys for their account.
users.noRolesAssignedDescription: No roles assigned to this account.
users.assignRoleHint: Select a previously loaded role from user databases, or input a specific Role UUID.
users.cannotRemoveOwnRoles: You cannot remove roles from your own admin account.
users.removeRoleConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to remove this role from the user?
users.cannotClearOwnLockout: You cannot clear lockout on your own admin account.
users.clearLockoutConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to clear the lockout for this account?
users.consentsDescription: View and revoke applications authorized by this user to access their account profile.
users.noConsentsDescription: This user has not authorized any OIDC applications yet.
users.cannotRevokeOwnConsent: You cannot revoke consents for your own admin account.
users.revokeConsentConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to revoke authorization for this application?

audit.title: Audit Logs
audit.description: Search security and administration events recorded by the identity service.
audit.noLogsDescription: No system audit logs match the query criteria.

system.title: System Status
system.description: Readiness checks and public OpenID Connect discovery metadata for this deployment.
system.healthTroubleshootingHint: Readiness is degraded. Check PostgreSQL, Redis, reverse proxy routing, and the GOSSO container logs before retrying.

profile.title: Profile & Password
profile.description: Review account attributes and update the password used for username and password sign-in.
profile.passwordUpdatedSuccess: Password updated successfully. Please use your new password next time.
profile.editEmailDescription: Verify your identity and confirm ownership of the new email address.

mfa.title: Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)
mfa.description: Protect your account with an authenticator app generating one-time passcode verification.
mfa.mfaNotEnrolledDescription: Multi-Factor Authentication adds an extra layer of security. Once activated, logging in will require your password and a verification code from your mobile authenticator app.
mfa.scanQrStep1: 1. Scan this QR Code with your Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, or generic TOTP app.
mfa.manualEntryStep2: 2. If you cannot scan the code, enter the following secret key manually in your app:
mfa.accountProtected: Your account is protected by MFA
mfa.totpRegistered: TOTP (Time-based One-time Password) application is registered.
mfa.recoveryBackupCodesDescription: Store these recovery backup codes in a safe place. Each code can only be used once if you lose your phone.
mfa.disableModalDescription: For security, you must enter your current account password to confirm disabling Multi-Factor Authentication.
mfa.regenerateConfirmMessage: Generating new backup codes will invalidate any existing recovery codes. Continue?

passkeys.title: Passkeys
passkeys.description: Register biometrics or hardware security keys for passwordless FIDO2 sign-in.
passkeys.noPasskeysDescription: Add your computer's built-in Touch ID/Face ID or an external FIDO2 key.
passkeys.registerModalDescription: Choose a friendly name for this passkey device so you can identify it later.
passkeys.passkeyNamePlaceholder: e.g. My YubiKey, Work Macbook TouchID
passkeys.passkeyNameRequired: Please provide a name for this device/passkey.
passkeys.invalidWebAuthnOptions: Server returned invalid WebAuthn options (missing challenge)
passkeys.removePasskeyConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to remove the passkey "{{name}}"?
passkeys.credentialOwnershipMismatch: This credential does not belong to your account.

sessions.title: Active Sessions
sessions.description: A list of browsers and devices currently signed in to your account.
sessions.terminateSessionConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to terminate this session? The device will be signed out immediately.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.description: An unexpected error occurred while rendering this page.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.
